title: SSRF guard bypassed by TOCTOU between DNS check and HTTP fetch
description: In server.rs handle_inbox (Follow handler), actor_cache.rs, media.rs, and relay.rs: the SSRF guard calls is_private_host_resolved() (which does a DNS lookup) and then later performs the actual HTTP request. A DNS rebinding attack can resolve to a public IP at check time and a private IP at fetch time. The reqwest client has no mechanism to bind the resolved address, so the check provides false confidence. Operators deploying on a host that also serves internal services are exposed. All four callers share this pattern.
close_reason: Accepted risk: documented as ponytail ceiling. DNS rebinding TOCTOU requires custom resolver which reqwest doesn't support.
